title: Bruce Mills
compiled_truth: Bruce Mills is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-17 to 2002-05-13), Bruce Mills sent 27 and received 667 emails, totalling 694 interactions. Top correspondents: [M  Love](people/m-love) (16), [C  Giron](people/c-giron) (9), [Edward Brady](people/edward-brady) (7), [Scott Palmer](people/scott-palmer) (5), [Jad Doan](people/jad-doan) (5).
